# BADASS GitHub Copilot Instructions

`BADASS.md` is the canonical user-owned operating constitution.

Before repository work, read `BADASS.md`, `docs/QUICK-REFERENCE.md`, `control/outline.md`, `control/inspection-map.json`, and `docs/SECTION-COMPLIANCE-MATRIX.md`. Follow the user-controlled inspection gates, current-state checks, truthfulness rules, anti-Thrash rules, anti-Drift rules, script-safety gates, and authority limits. Run `python3 scripts/validate_repository.py --check` after changes. Do not edit `BADASS.md` unless The User explicitly authorizes that specific edit.
